channel.title: Blog
channel.description: This is My New Hugo Site

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi, I’m Monit👋. → I live in Gujarat,India, and I’m a Cyber Security Student → I avoid love coffee* (sidenote: But I did go through a zero-caffeine phase, so now I’m a rather moderate coffee drinker.), tweet occasionally, have a few → interesting side projects, and try to do open source. → To get a better idea of what I’ve been working on, check out my GitHub. → If you like any of my projects, or posts on this blog, please do let me know via email, I’d love to hear from you!

item.title: CTF
item.description: Domain Name Level Link TryHackMe Agent-T Easy click here TryHackMe Olympus Medium click here TryHackMe Hacker vs Hacker Medium click here Vulnub Aragog Easy click here

item.title: Resume
item.description: Resume monitkhatri685@gmail.com | +91 7014577214 | GITHUB Monit Khatri – Penetration tester Summary I have earned bug bounty from BugBase. Hands-on experience in V.A.P.T Contribution to open-source repositories on GitHub Embraces open-source tools and technologies Skills Architectural Pattern – Microservice, Model View Controller, n-tier application Programming & Scripting Language – C#, Powershell, SQL, JavaScript, JQuery, CSS, LESS, HTML, Python, JAVA, PHP. Framework – WebAPI, WCF, MVC, Entity Framework, NHibernate, Automapper, Microsoft Unity, LINQ, ASP.
